columns.name: DATO
columns.description: The date of the transaction or document

columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: The department number where the transaction occurred

columns.name: FOMR
columns.description: The form or document number associated with the transaction

columns.name: PRODUKT_VISMA
columns.description: The Visma product code for the transaction item

columns.name: FKNR
columns.description: The function number related to the transaction or document

columns.name: BILAGSNUMMER
columns.description: The attachment or reference number associated with the document

columns.name: BILAGSDATO
columns.description: The date of the attached document or record

columns.name: VALUTERINGSDATO
columns.description: The date when the transaction is valued in the system

columns.name: BILAGSART
columns.description: The type of attachment or document associated with the transaction

columns.name: BILAGSTEKST
columns.description: The text description of the attached document

columns.name: DEBET_KONTONR
columns.description: The number of the account where a debit is made

columns.name: KREDIT_KONTONR
columns.description: The number of the account where a credit is made

columns.name: AVGIFTSKODE
columns.description: The tax code associated with the transaction or document

columns.name: VALUTAKODE
columns.description: The currency code of the financial value in the transaction

columns.name: VALUTAKURS
columns.description: The exchange rate used to convert the value into a specified currency

columns.name: BELOP_I_VALUTA
columns.description: The amount of the transaction in the specified currency

columns.name: BELOP
columns.description: The monetary value associated with the transaction or document

columns.name: FAKTURANR
columns.description: The number of the invoice related to the transaction

columns.name: FORFALLSDATO
columns.description: The date by which payment for the transaction is due

columns.name: PROSJEKT_AKTIVITET
columns.description: The project or activity identifier related to the transaction

columns.name: ANSATT
columns.description: The employee number responsible for the transaction or document

columns.name: INKNJOP_ORDRENR
columns.description: The number of the purchase order related to the transaction

columns.name: ENHETSNR
columns.description: The unit or location number where the transaction occurred

columns.name: LEVAVD
columns.description: The LevAvd identifier related to the transaction

columns.name: FILTYPE
columns.description: The type of file or document associated with the transaction

columns.name: PERIODISER_K_KTONR
columns.description: The periodiser account number related to the transaction

columns.name: REFERANSENR
columns.description: A reference or identifier for additional information related to the transaction

columns.name: ORDRNR
columns.description: Unique order identifier

columns.name: VLINJENR
columns.description: The line number of the transaction or document item

columns.name: ORDREKL
columns.description: A description related to the order, possibly used for notes or comments

columns.name: ORDRETYPE
columns.description: The type of order associated with the transaction

columns.name: FAKTOKODE
columns.description: The code for a fact or event related to the transaction

columns.name: SALGSKONSULENT
columns.description: The sales consultant responsible for the order or document

columns.name: MEKANIKER
columns.description: The mechanic identifier related to the transaction, possibly used for service orders

columns.name: MOTTAKER
columns.description: The recipient of the document or order, possibly a customer

columns.name: MOTTAKERPOSTNR
columns.description: The postal number of the recipient, if applicable

columns.name: MOTTAKER_KOMMUNE
columns.description: The commune or municipality of the recipient address

columns.name: BETBET
columns.description: The method used for payment, if applicable

columns.name: BETFORM
columns.description: The form or type of billing related to the transaction

columns.name: KONTOKODE
columns.description: The account code associated with the financial record

columns.name: KUNDENR
columns.description: The customer number related to the transaction or document

columns.name: KUNDEPOSTNR
columns.description: The postal number of the customer address, if applicable

columns.name: KUNDE_KOMMUNE
columns.description: The commune or municipality of the customer address

columns.name: KUNDEGR
columns.description: The group to which the customer belongs, for categorization purposes

columns.name: ANSVARLIG_VARUAVDELNING
columns.description: The warehouse or distribution center responsible for the transaction

columns.name: PRODUKT
columns.description: The product involved in the transaction, if applicable

columns.name: LEVPUNKT
columns.description: The lev point identifier related to the transaction or document

columns.name: PRODUKT_KATEGORI
columns.description: The category of the product involved in the transaction

columns.name: VAREGRUPP
columns.description: The group or classification of the item, possibly for inventory management

columns.name: UTLADDNINGSTYP
columns.description: The type of unloading process involved in the transaction

columns.name: BESKRIVELSE
columns.description: A detailed description or notes related to the transaction or document item

columns.name: ANTAL
columns.description: The quantity of items involved in the transaction or document

columns.name: MENYKOD
columns.description: The menu code associated with a specific transaction type or service

columns.name: VARUGRUPP_KATEGORI
columns.description: The category of the item group, possibly for inventory management purposes

columns.name: PRIS_KOMBINATION
columns.description: A combination or variation in pricing associated with the transaction

columns.name: FRADRAGS_KATEGORI
columns.description: The category of any discounts applied to the transaction

columns.name: PRIS
columns.description: The price associated with the transaction or document item

columns.name: FRADRAGSANTAL
columns.description: The quantity of any discounts applied to the transaction, if applicable

columns.name: FRAKTKOSTNADER
columns.description: Any freight or transportation costs associated with the transaction

columns.name: TJENESTELYNAMMER
columns.description: The terms and conditions for services related to the transaction

columns.name: VARUAVDELNING
columns.description: The warehouse or distribution center where the item is stored, if applicable

columns.name: VARUMÅNGDE
columns.description: The measurement of the product involved in the transaction, if applicable

columns.name: TILSTOEDIG_VAREGRUPP
columns.description: The group or category of items that are available for the transaction

columns.name: LEVPUNKT_KATEGORI
columns.description: The category of the lev point, possibly for inventory management purposes

columns.name: VARUERIKOD
columns.description: A specific item code or identifier used in the transaction

columns.name: BESKRIVELSE_VARUERIKOD
columns.description: The description of a specific item code, if applicable

columns.name: VARUKATEGORI
columns.description: The category or classification of the product involved in the transaction

columns.name: BESKRIVELSE_VARUKATEGORI
columns.description: A description or notes related to the item category, if applicable
